title: ExceptionLedgerEntry
description: A signed, time-boxed exception ledger record that temporarily permits a bounded bypass or egress allowance under explicit review and expiry.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. "2.0.0".

linkedPolicyId.description: Optional URN of the policy whose normal behavior is being temporarily relaxed.

subject.description: Stable identifier of the subject or subsystem receiving the exception.

reason.description: Human-readable explanation of why this temporary exception is allowed.

cidrs.description: CIDR ranges allowed by the exception.

capabilities.description: Capability identifiers or capability classes authorized during the exception window.

notes.description: Optional explanatory notes or human review instructions.

scope.description: Structured scope of the temporary exception.

approvedBy.description: Signer or reviewer identifiers who approved the exception.

issuedAt.description: ISO 8601 date-time when the exception became active.

expiresAt.description: ISO 8601 date-time when the exception expires.

status.description: Current lifecycle state of the exception entry.

signature.description: Detached signature or signature reference proving approval of this exception.
